heading: Limitation on accrual of increased pay or benefits
label: 12773 Limitation on accrual of increased pay or benefits
text: Unless otherwise provided by law, no person is entitled to increased pay or other benefits because of sections 12771 and 12772 of this title.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 1374(d) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(k)(2)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
